---
title: "EDA"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# 1. Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA)

```{r librairies, echo=FALSE}
# Load necessary libraries
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(readxl)
```

```{r import, echo=FALSE}
# Import the dataset
dataset <- read_excel("data/rugby.xlsx")
```

## Summary of the dataset, head, and structure

```{r summary, echo=FALSE}
# Summary of the dataset
summary(dataset)
# Head of the dataset
head(dataset)
# Structure of the dataset
str(dataset)
```
